YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.aromaPrinciple: [sine][pink]Ye Shunguang of Yunkui Summit, with this blade I shatter delusions.[/pink][/sine]
YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.cardsModifierDe: Ye Shunguang's card will now appear in rewards and shops.
YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.description: Disciple of Yunkui Summit, The Master of Qingming Sword, Void Hunter Qingming Arbite——Ye Shunguang.
YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.eventDeathPreve: I’m sorry… Shifu… Junior Sister / Brother…
YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.goldMonologue: [sine]Time to pick out some gifts for my junior sister / brother..[/sine]
YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.title: Ye Shunguang
YESHUNGUANG-YE_SHUNGUANG.unlockText: No need to unlock; if you see this line of text, it means this is a bug.
